title: Undergraduate Commencement
location: Yerba Buena Center for the Arts
description: Join us to celebrate the Class of 2026 undergraduate students as they receive their degrees.
longDescription: California College of the Arts proudly presents its 119th Commencement, honoring the extraordinary achievements of our undergraduate Class of 2026. This morning ceremony celebrates the artists, designers, architects, and writers who have shaped their creative voices over the past four years. Join family, friends, faculty, and fellow graduates for a memorable morning of recognition, reflection, and celebration.

studentSpeaker.name: Maya Chen
studentSpeaker.speechHighlights: Maya will reflect on the transformative power of creative community, exploring how collaboration across disciplines has shaped the Class of 2026.
